messages.content: # Want to launch Assetto Corsa through steam? Follow this Guide!

## Step 1
> Ensure you have launched Assetto Corsa on steam at least once WITHOUT any mods installed. Close it once it fully opens 

## Step 2
> Go to `Content Manager > Settings > Content Manager > Drive` & click `Switch to steam starter`

## Step 3
> Restart your pc and launch Assetto Corsa from steam, which will open Content Manager
